title: Lower Bound
text: Home * Search * Score * Lower Bound There are two semantics inside an Alpha-Beta like search, related to Lower Bounds : Alpha is an Lower Bound of a score for this node . A Lower Bound is returned from an Alpha-Beta like search, if it fails high . The node searched was a confirmed Cut-Node . See also [ edit ] Alpha-Beta Bound Exact Score Integrated Bounds and Values Score Transposition Table Upper Bound Forum Posts [ edit ] Using just Upperbounds and Lowerbounds by Alvaro Jose Povoa Cardoso , CCC , February 01, 2001 bound type in PVS ? by Mahmoud Uthman , CCC , January 23, 2017 » Bound , Exact Score , Principal Variation Search External Links [ edit ] Upper and lower bounds from Wikipedia Branch-and-bound from Wikipedia Up one level
